## Change type

- [ ] Runtime/source code
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Website/docs site
- [ ] Tests/benchmarks
- [ ] CI/release/package metadata

## Validation

Run the checks that match the change and mark them below.

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run test:exports`
- [ ] `bun run test:package`
- [ ] `bun run test:bundle-size`
- [ ] `bun run bench:ci`
- [ ] `bun run test:visual`
- [ ] `bun run test:interaction`
- [ ] `bun run pages:build`
- [ ] `bun run docs:readme`
- [ ] Not run / not applicable:

## Screenshots or preview links

Add screenshots, recordings, or docs preview links for visible UI/docs changes.
